revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#switch:{{MONTHNUMBER|{{{1}}}}}|1=January|2=February|3=March|4=April|5=May|6=June|7=July|8=August|9=September|10=October|11=November|12=December|Incorrect required parameter 1=''month''!}}|Missing required parameter 1=''month''!}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#switch:{{MONTHNUMBER|{{{1}}}}}|1=Muharram|2=Safar|3=Rabi' al-Awwal|4=Rabi' al-Thani|5=Jumada al-Awwal|6=Jumada al-Thani|7=Rajab|8=Sha'ban|9=Ramadan|10=Shawwal|11=Dhu al-Qadah|12=Dhu al-Hijjah|Incorrect required parameter 1=''month''!}}|Missing required parameter 1=''month''!}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

<includeonly> {{#if:{{{1|}}} | {{#switch:{{#expr:{{{1}}}+0}} <!-- strips any leading zero --> | 1 = Muharram | 2 = Safar | 3 = Rabi' al-Awwal | 4 = Rabi' al-Thani | 5 = Jumada al-Awwal | 6 = Jumada al-Thani | 7 = Rajab | 8 = Sha'ban | 9 = Ramadan | 10 = Shawwal | 11 = Dhu al-Qadah | 12 = Dhu al-Hijjah | #default = Incorrect month number “{{{1}}}”! }} | Missing required parameter 1 = “month”! }} </includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#switch:{{MONTHNUMBER|{{{1}}}}}|1=Muharram|2=Safar|3=Rabi' al-Awwal|4=Rabi' al-Thani|5=Jumada al-Awwal|6=Jumada al-Thani|7=Rajab|8=Sha'ban|9=Ramadan|10=Shawwal|11=Dhu al-Qadah|12=Dhu al-Hijjah|Incorrect required parameter 1=''month''!}}|Missing required parameter 1=''month''!}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#switch:{{MONTHNUMBER|{{{1}}}}}|1=Muharram|2=Safar|3=Rabi' al-Awwal|4=Rabi' al-Thani|5=Jumada al-Awwal|6=Jumada al-Thani|7=Rajab|8=Sha'ban|9=Ramadan|10=Shawwal|11=Dhu al-Qadah|12=Dhu al-Hijjah|Incorrect required parameter 1=''month''!}}|Missing required parameter 1=''month''!}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}} [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#switch: {{{1|}}} |1 = Muharram |2 = Safar |3 = Rabi' al-Awwal |4 = Rabi' al-Thani |5 = Jumada al-Awwal |6 = Jumada al-Thani |7 = Rajab |8 = Sha'ban |9 = Ramadan |10 = Shawwal |11 = Dhu al-Qadah |12 = Dhu al-Hijjah |#default = {{{1}}} <!-- fall-back: just echo input --> }}</includeonly><noinclude> Documentation / testcases here …
{{Documentation}} [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

<!-- ARABICMONTHNAME Returns the English name of an Islamic (Hijri) month.
Usage: {{ARABICMONTHNAME|1}} {{ARABICMONTHNAME|Muharram}}
Optional 2nd parameter “format=arabic” (or “a”) turns the result into Arabic script instead of English. {{ARABICMONTHNAME|1|a}} → مُحَرَّم {{ARABICMONTHNAME|Muharram|arabic}} → مُحَرَّم -->
{{#switch: {{{1|}}} <!-- accept digit *or* English name --> | 1 = Muharram | 2 = Safar | 3 = Rabi' al-Awwal | 4 = Rabi' al-Thani | 5 = Jumada al-Ula | 6 = Jumada al-Akhira | 7 = Rajab | 8 = Sha'ban | 9 = Ramadan | 10 = Shawwal | 11 = Dhu al-Qadah | 12 = Dhu al-Hijjah | Muharram = Muharram | Safar = Safar | Rabi' al-Awwal = Rabi' al-Awwal | Rabi' al-Thani = Rabi' al-Thani | Jumada al-Ula = Jumada al-Ula | Jumada al-Akhira= Jumada al-Akhira | Rajab = Rajab | Sha'ban = Sha'ban | Ramadan = Ramadan | Shawwal = Shawwal | Dhu al-Qadah = Dhu al-Qadah | Dhu al-Hijjah = Dhu al-Hijjah | #default = {{{1}}}<!-- fall back to raw input --> }}<!-- end switch -->
<!-- If the caller asked for Arabic form, convert it --> {{#if: {{#switch: {{{2|}}}|a|arabic=1}} | <!-- a little switch-table again --> {{#switch: {{{1|}}} | 1|Muharram = مُحَرَّم | 2|Safar = صَفَر | 3|Rabi' al-Awwal = رَبِيع ٱلْأَوَّل | 4|Rabi' al-Thani = رَبِيع ٱلثَّانِي | 5|Jumada al-Ula = جُمَادَىٰ ٱلْأُولَىٰ | 6|Jumada al-Akhira = جُمَادَىٰ ٱلْآخِرَة | 7|Rajab = رَجَب | 8|Sha'ban = شَعْبَان | 9|Ramadan = رَمَضَان | 10|Shawwal = شَوَّال | 11|Dhu al-Qadah = ذُو ٱلْقَعْدَة | 12|Dhu al-Hijjah = ذُو ٱلْحِجَّة | #default = {{{1}}} }} }}
<noinclude> Documentation / testcases here …
{{Documentation}} [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#switch:{{MONTHNUMBER|{{{1}}}}}|1=Muharram|2=Safar|3=Rabi' al-Awwal|4=Rabi' al-Thani|5=Jumada al-Awwal|6=Jumada al-Thani|7=Rajab|8=Sha'ban|9=Ramadan|10=Shawwal|11=Dhu al-Qadah|12=Dhu al-Hijjah|Incorrect required parameter 1=''month''!}}|Missing required parameter 1=''month''!}}</includeonly><noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=ARABICMONTHNAME here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
